mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.emp_no AS empNo, e.name, e.gender, e.dept_id AS deptId, d.dept_name AS deptName, e.position, e.entry_date AS entryDate, e.status, e.phone, e.email FROM emp_employee e INNER JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id ORDER BY e.id

SELECT e.id, e.emp_no AS empNo, e.name, e.gender, e.dept_id AS deptId, d.dept_name AS deptName, e.position, e.entry_date AS entryDate, e.status, e.phone, e.email FROM emp_employee e INNER JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id WHERE e.id = #{empId}
